name: Smurfit Westrock plc
description: Smurfit Westrock plc is a leading global provider of sustainable paper and packaging solutions. Formed through the combination of Smurfit Kappa and WestRock, the company operates an extensive network of packaging converting facilities and paper mills across 40 countries. It specializes in the design and manufacture of renewable, recyclable, and biodegradable fiber-based packaging, including corrugated containers, containerboard, and specialty packaging products. Headquartered in Dublin, Ireland, Smurfit Westrock serves a diverse range of industries, leveraging its integrated supply chain and commitment to circular economy principles to deliver innovative, high-performance packaging solutions to customers worldwide.
